scripts.build: npx emscripten-build emcc -O3 -std=c++17 src/BitReaderWriter.cpp src/Encoder.cpp src/Decoder.cpp -Iinclude -s WASM=1 -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS="['_compress', '_decompress']" -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_NAME="'Module'" -o public/huffman_wasm.js && mkdir -p dist && cp -r public/* dist/
